name: Masnun Siam
aboutDescription: I'm a software engineer specializing in backend development with Laravel and PHP, bringing a unique perspective from 4+ years of mobile development experience. I build robust server-side solutions, RESTful APIs, and scalable web applications. My journey from Flutter development to backend engineering gives me comprehensive understanding of the full development lifecycle — having been on the consuming side of APIs, I design backend architectures that are truly developer-friendly and create seamless frontend-backend integrations. I have hands-on experience leading development teams, conducting code reviews, and ensuring best practices.

experiences.description: Working as a backend-focused software engineer, building robust server-side solutions, RESTful APIs, and scalable web applications using Laravel and PHP. Collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality software that meets business requirements.

Led a small, diverse team of junior developers, successfully delivering stable client projects. Contributed to backend development using PHP and Laravel, and reviewed code to ensure quality and adherence to best practices.

Utilized native channels in Flutter apps to create seamless integrations with platform-specific components. Implemented complex designs with CustomPaint in Flutter apps. Deployed and published apps on Google Play Store and Apple App Store. Integrated payment services like In-App-Purchase and Stripe.

Developed and maintained cross-platform applications for various clients using Flutter and Dart. Used state management techniques such as Provider, BLoC, Riverpod, and GetX. Integrated apps with REST APIs, Firebase, and cloud services. Applied TDD, DDD, MVC, and MVVM models for code quality. Explored blockchain and Ethereum networks to develop decentralized applications using Solidity.
